Click a country on the map to jump to its section.

NL

Netherlands

5 cities available

The Netherlands is a small, densely populated country known for its flat landscape, cycling culture, and progressive policies. It ranks consistently high in quality of life, safety, and work-life balance. English proficiency is among the highest in Europe, making it a popular destination for international professionals.

Weather

Maritime climate with mild summers (17-22°C) and cool winters (2-6°C). Expect around 1,600 hours of ...

Safety

The Netherlands is considered one of the safest countries in Europe, with low rates of violent crime...

Cost of Living

Moderate to high cost of living by European standards. Housing costs are the largest expense, partic...

Cities in Netherlands

Amsterdam
Rotterdam
The Hague
Eindhoven
Utrecht
FR

France

9 cities available

France is Western Europe's largest country, renowned for its culture, cuisine, and quality of life. It offers world-class healthcare, excellent public infrastructure, and a diverse range of living environments from cosmopolitan Paris to charming regional cities. The 35-hour workweek reflects the importance placed on leisure and family time.

Weather

Varied climate ranging from oceanic in the north to Mediterranean in the south. Paris averages 1,660...

Safety

France is generally safe with well-funded public services. Urban areas may experience higher rates o...

Cost of Living

Cost of living varies significantly by region. Paris is among Europe's most expensive cities, while ...

Paris
Lyon
Bordeaux
Marseille
Lille
Nantes
Nice
Strasbourg
Annecy
DE

Germany

5 cities available

Germany is Europe's largest economy and a powerhouse of engineering, technology, and innovation. It offers a high standard of living, robust social security, excellent infrastructure, and a strong job market. With a federal system, each state has its own character — from cosmopolitan Berlin to prosperous Bavaria.

Weather

Temperate continental climate with cold winters (-1 to 4°C) and warm summers (18-24°C). The south an...

Safety

Germany is one of the safest countries in Europe. Crime rates are low and the rule of law is strong....

Cost of Living

Generally moderate by Western European standards. Munich and Frankfurt are more expensive; Berlin re...

Cities in Germany

Berlin
Munich
Frankfurt
Stuttgart
Hamburg
IT

Italy

3 cities available

Italy offers an unmatched combination of history, culture, cuisine, and natural beauty. From the fashion capital of Milan to eternal Rome and the Alps of Torino, Italy provides a deeply rewarding lifestyle. The pace of life is slower and quality of living high, though bureaucracy and economic challenges persist in some regions.

Weather

Mediterranean climate in the south (hot, dry summers; mild winters) to temperate continental in the ...

Safety

Italy is generally safe. Petty crime such as pickpocketing can be common in tourist areas of Rome an...

Cost of Living

Moderate cost of living overall, with wide regional variation. Milan is the most expensive city; Rom...

Cities in Italy

Rome
Milan
Torino
HU

Hungary

1 cities available

Hungary offers one of the most affordable lifestyles in the EU, centred around its stunning capital Budapest. With a flat income tax rate, low cost of living, and a growing tech and startup scene, it attracts expats looking for European city life on a budget. EU membership means freedom of movement within the bloc.

Weather

Continental climate with hot summers (22-28°C) and cold winters (-1 to 4°C). Budapest averages aroun...

Safety

Hungary is generally safe with low violent crime rates. Budapest is considered one of the safer East...

Cost of Living

One of the most affordable EU countries. Budapest offers excellent value — quality restaurants, tran...

Cities in Hungary

Budapest
ES

Spain

3 cities available

Spain combines a Mediterranean lifestyle with modern European infrastructure. Known for its warm climate, vibrant culture, world-class gastronomy, and strong work-life balance, it consistently ranks among the most popular expat destinations. Major cities offer strong job markets in tech, tourism, and international business.

Weather

Mediterranean climate dominates the coast with hot, dry summers and mild winters. Madrid has a semi-...

Safety

Spain is generally safe and ranks well in global safety indices. Tourist areas in Barcelona and Madr...

Cost of Living

Moderate cost of living by Western European standards. Spain is significantly cheaper than Northern ...

Madrid
Barcelona
Valencia
BE

Belgium

2 cities available

Belgium punches above its weight as a small country with outsized influence — home to NATO, the EU headquarters, and a high standard of living. With excellent healthcare, strong social protection, and a central location in Western Europe, it's a popular base for international professionals and diplomats.

Weather

Maritime temperate climate similar to the Netherlands — mild, wet, and often cloudy. Summers are war...

Safety

Belgium is generally safe. Brussels has some areas with higher crime rates, but the city is overall ...

Cost of Living

Higher cost of living than Eastern Europe but moderate within Western Europe. Brussels and Antwerp a...

Brussels
Antwerp
CH

Switzerland

2 cities available

Switzerland is synonymous with high quality of life, political stability, and precision. With some of Europe's highest salaries, pristine natural landscapes, excellent infrastructure, and a tradition of neutrality, it attracts top international talent. The cost of living is equally high, but purchasing power often remains strong.

Weather

Varied by altitude and region. Lowland cities (Geneva, Zurich) have temperate climates with warm sum...

Safety

Switzerland consistently ranks among the world's safest countries. Crime rates are very low, and the...

Cost of Living

Switzerland has the highest cost of living in Europe. Groceries, dining, housing, and healthcare are...

Cities in Switzerland

Geneva
Zurich
AT

Austria

1 cities available

Austria offers a remarkable combination of cultural richness, natural beauty, and high living standards. Vienna consistently ranks as the world's most liveable city. With strong social welfare, universal healthcare, and a central European location, Austria is an increasingly popular expat destination.

Weather

Continental climate with cold winters (-1 to 4°C in Vienna) and warm summers (22-26°C). Austria aver...

Safety

Austria is one of the safest countries in Europe. Vienna consistently scores highly in global safety...

Cost of Living

Moderate to high cost of living. Vienna is expensive by regional standards but more affordable than ...

Vienna
PT

Portugal

2 cities available

Portugal has emerged as one of Europe's most sought-after expat destinations — combining Atlantic charm, a warm climate, affordable living, and growing tech hubs in Lisbon and Porto. The country offers excellent quality of life at a fraction of Northern European costs, with a welcoming culture and impressive safety record.

Weather

Mediterranean and Atlantic climate with warm, sunny summers (25-30°C) and mild winters (10-15°C). Li...

Safety

Portugal consistently ranks among the world's safest countries. Both Lisbon and Porto are considered...

Cost of Living

One of the most affordable Western European countries. Lisbon has become pricier due to expat demand...

Cities in Portugal

Lisbon
Porto
DK

Denmark

1 cities available

Denmark is the birthplace of hygge — the art of cosy, contented living. It consistently tops global rankings for happiness, quality of life, and work-life balance. With one of Europe's most egalitarian societies, strong public services, and a booming life-science and tech sector, Denmark is a compelling destination for skilled expats.

Weather

Maritime climate with mild, overcast summers (18-22°C) and cold, dark winters (0-4°C). Copenhagen av...

Safety

Denmark is one of the world's safest countries. Copenhagen has very low crime rates and the rule of ...

Cost of Living

High cost of living — among the highest in Europe. Alcohol, food, and dining out are especially expe...

Cities in Denmark

Copenhagen
SE

Sweden

1 cities available

Sweden combines Scandinavian design sensibility with a world-class social system, strong innovation economy, and a deep commitment to sustainability and equality. Stockholm is a leading European tech and startup hub, and the country offers an exceptionally high quality of life across all regions.

Weather

Temperate to subarctic climate with long, cold winters and short but pleasant summers. Stockholm ave...

Safety

Sweden is generally safe with strong rule of law and high trust in institutions. Stockholm is consid...

Cost of Living
